emails.subject: FW: Enron - Guaranty
emails.body: FW: Enron Guaranty Gerald! I know that you are out for the week. Upon you return I will be happy if you can review this incoming guaranty for the benefit Bridgeline Gas Marketing, LLC. Could you forward comments to the sender and cc me. Thanks Rudwell. To: Johnson, Rudwell

emails.subject: FW: Enron - Guaranty
emails.body: FW: Enron Guaranty We are currently working on putting in place a contract with Reliant Energy Services, Inc. Attached below is a format of the counterparty's guaranty format (proposed guaranty amount is $40.00MM). Kindly review and forward comments back to the listed contact. Thanks Rudwell. 713 345-3596

emails.subject: RE: Enron - Guaranty
emails.body: RE: Enron Guaranty This form of guaranty is acceptable. No changes required.
